title: Better Title
body:
## ✅ Features:

**Change the minecraft/edition logo splashes and panorama!**

## 📖 Need to know:

**But you can change it by  yourself! Because this isnt a mod that very easy to change the logo!**

<details>
<summary>How do I change the logo,splashes and panorama?</summary>

**Very Easy!**

**_Just check the README.txt file in the resource pack!_**

</details>

## 📢 Other

**_i use own resource pack because normal minecraft logo and edition logo is boring, yes i can use mods but this resource pack is simple-to change for yourself!_**
